evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Soul Urn
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page describes Soul Urn as a neutral objective with pickup, carry, drop, delivery, reward, and update-history mechanics.
limitations: Secondary source; not treated as official authority.
Historical build applicability is not established for build 23916427.

evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Mid Boss
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page describes Mid Boss as a neutral objective that can produce a Rejuvenator-related reward path.
limitations: Secondary source.
Mid Boss kill and Rejuvenator claim are kept as separate telemetry requirements.

evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Rejuvenator
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page describes Rejuvenator as an objective reward related to Mid Boss with team-wide effects that must be observed separately from the Mid Boss death.
limitations: Secondary source.
Historical version and exact effect values are not applied to replay builds without mapping.

evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Souls
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page describes Souls as the economy resource with multiple acquisition and spending contexts.
limitations: Secondary source.
Project telemetry currently validates net worth availability, not full income-source or unsecured-soul semantics.

evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Death
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page describes player death, respawn, and related consequences as mechanics distinct from parser pawn lifecycle events.
limitations: Secondary source.
Replay telemetry can validate death-counter and pawn-lifecycle events but not every current-game death consequence.

evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Guardian
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page documents Guardian as a structure/objective category relevant to lane and base progression.
limitations: Secondary source.
This task records identity requirements only; no structure analysis is performed.

evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Walker
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page documents Walker as a structure/objective category relevant to progression and destruction events.
limitations: Secondary source.
Exact historical mechanics and rewards require patch/build mapping.

evidence.title: Deadlock Wiki: Patron
evidence.claimSummary: Current wiki page documents Patron as the base objective with state/phase-sensitive mechanics.
limitations: Secondary source.
Patron phase/state telemetry for replay 009 is not validated by this task.

evidence.title: Valve Deadlock Update: May 27, 2025
evidence.claimSummary: Official update page demonstrates that objective/economy mechanics can change by dated patch, so mechanics records need versioned validity.
limitations: This source does not map build 23916427 to a patch.
This source is used as patch-registry evidence, not as full rule import.

evidence.title: Project replay 009 telemetry validation
evidence.claimSummary: Project validation records replay 009 as a normal human match with position coverage, death lifecycle consistency, and net worth availability, but no active-game-time or pause interval source.
limitations: Project observation, not external mechanics authority.
Does not prove any objective or economy modifier was active.
